TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Toda = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang Toda. 252 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 795 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 97% niqan 773 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 3% niqan 22 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, kleelug hari ka nseejiq alang nii. Hangan alang alang Toda Tnteanak knmalu alang Wa mniq jen-ay syang Toda cun ka alang Toda, pndaan tyyayung yayung Mtudu, niqan dwiyaq Wey-san(2682m) ka hnraan hidaw, niqan sapah paysan tutipiq ka alang ruwan. Nniqan na Nan-tou seyn jen-ay syang Toda cun. Llabang na Wa mniq Rusan dxral tudaya 7km, ssipaw iril yayung Mtudu. Lnglingay na ti-ri šļ§ťÄöŤ≥áŤ®äDdwiyaq haypa 1200m. Patas kklaun ndaan tpaan Mriq rulu: kndadax Tay-14seyn mlutuc 85 seyn mrmux. Mwaluk dieyn-c ti-tu dieyn-c ti-tu alang. Kluwan tnsediq alang Sediq. Kari ddiyun Kari Sediq,kari Tlu. Snhiyan kyokay Kyokay sing-yey-su,kyokay cyo-ro,kyokay deyn-cu Pnyahan alang Wa mniq tudaya dxral 7km Rusan ka alang Pingcing, ssipaw iril yayung mtudu, ddwiyaq tuhunacdwiyaq wey-san, wa qnlangan ddwiyaq ka spac muhing na, ou balay mshrus na dxral, wana bay mkyyungan niqan cikuh hari brnux, ngalan dha phangan brnux Toda, pnspuwan na mhiyu alang 4: Tonbarah:Wa mniq tuhunac bay dxral brnux Pingcing, kiya pwla bay psupu smalu alang. Sga:Wa mniq tubaraw bay dxral brnux Pingcing. Rucau:Wa mniq baraw dxral mshrus muxul Rucau. Brah kngkawas Tlu 4(kngkawas 1908) idas 12 cka na"cckulan ddaun qquri Paran Ay-young-cung", prading u hmntur kmciyuk qmptingan cckulan ddaun nii ka sediq nToda, kiya ka mniq hngkawas bukuy idas 1 diyax 2 dhuq 7 daw, Kndadax cwey-fong cmbu paru puniq kana alang Toda, nou bay cmiyuk ka rrisaw mbiyax alang uka rrihan uri, kiya kndadax hini ini bay knbiyax cmiyuk Tanah Tunux ka alang nii, brah kngkawas1(knkawas1908) idas 1diyax 16 pnsdhu kari keysacu Tanah Tunux mi sediq nToda, bukuy daw mntna na kngkawas idas 8 mniq alang nii, brah kngkawas1(knkawas1908) idas 1diyax 16 pnsdhu kari keysacu Tanah Tunux mi sediq nToda, bukuy daw mntna na kngkawas idas 8 mniq alang Tonbarah phiyu "sapah ptasan Toda "(sapah ptasan Pingcing saya). Bukuy ndaan Paran nii pa, miicu sediqToda cmiyuk ka keysacu Tanah Tunux, kiya pskyuxay dmka tnsapah wada na dhdilan alang Snuwil, id ana pswayay ka biyax dha; kiya uri u mniq kkaalang psmalu ini pnsdungus, kiya ka msshuun, pseuka lnglungan cmiyuk Tanah Tunux; Kingal uri, plwanun na ka wa thiyaq alang sslian dxral brnuxToda, kiya sa pswaaw qmita, kiya peyyah hini daw, wada pspuwan Tanah Tunux ka alang nii ngakan hangan alang Toda, ngalun Tlu ka Taywan nii daw ryuxun hangan Pingcing da. Nniqan alang saya nii u psnakun na: Alang tuhunac sapah ptasan Pingcing mi wa niqan saoah paysan Pingcing u kiya paru bay alang Tnbarah;Sga mi Ayu ka mquri tudaya; Sing-yey-su kyokay,sslian ddaun alang, sslian bbriyun phpah mi nniqan habung alang nii u wa mniq Rucau kiya. Pnklaun pnatas rmiyaw mi qqtaan pusu bay pnhyuwan dxral Natou seyn-ri sapah paysan tutipiq "546"Natou seyn jenay syangToda cun hwa-guwan ru 17 hawp Qntaan pnatas Patas Natou seyn jenay syang kong-swe wan-can
S.PHON: = toda = gaga mniq nantows…ôn …ünajsjaŇč ka alaŇč toda. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, kl…ô…ôlug ńßa…ĺi ka ns…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč nii. ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč toda tnt…ôanak knmalu alaŇč wa mniq …ü…ôn-aj sjaŇč toda ¶un ka alaŇč toda, pndaan tjjajuŇč jajuŇč mtudu, niqan dwijaq w…ô-san(****m) ka ńßn…ĺaan ńßidaw, niqan sapańß pajsan tutipiq ka alaŇč …ĺuwan. nniqan na nan-tou s…ôn …ü…ôn-aj sjaŇč toda ¶un. llabaŇč na wa mniq …ĺusan dx…ĺal tudaja *km, ssipaw i…ĺil jajuŇč mtudu. lŇčliŇčaj na ti-…ĺi ****ddwijaq ńßajpa ****m. patas kklaun ndaan tpaan m…ĺiq …ĺulu: kndadax taj-**s…ôn mlutu ¶ ** s…ôn m…ĺmux. mwaluk di…ôn- ¶ ti-tu di…ôn- ¶ ti-tu alaŇč. kluwan tns…ôdiq alaŇč s…ôdiq. ka…ĺi ddijun ka…ĺi s…ôdiq,ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan kjokaj kjokaj siŇč-j…ô-su,kjokaj ¶jo-…ĺo,kjokaj d…ôn- ¶u pnjańßan alaŇč wa mniq tudaja dx…ĺal *km …ĺusan ka alaŇč piŇč ¶iŇč, ssipaw i…ĺil jajuŇč mtudu, ddwijaq tuńßuna ¶dwijaq w…ô-san, wa qnlaŇčan ddwijaq ka spa ¶ muńßiŇč na, ou balaj msńß…ĺus na dx…ĺal, wana baj mkjjuŇčan niqan ¶ikuńß ńßa…ĺi b…ĺnux, Ňčalan dńßa pńßaŇčan b…ĺnux toda, pnspuwan na mńßiju alaŇč *: tonba…ĺańß:wa mniq tuńßuna ¶ baj dx…ĺal b…ĺnux piŇč ¶iŇč, kija pwla baj psupu smalu alaŇč. sga:wa mniq tuba…ĺaw baj dx…ĺal b…ĺnux piŇč ¶iŇč. …ĺu ¶au:wa mniq ba…ĺaw dx…ĺal msńß…ĺus muxul …ĺu ¶au. b…ĺańß kŇčkawas tlu *(kŇčkawas ****) idas ** ¶ka na" ¶ ¶kulan ddaun qqu…ĺi pa…ĺan aj-jouŇč- ¶uŇč", p…ĺadiŇč u ńßmntu…ĺ km ¶ijuk qmptiŇčan ¶ ¶kulan ddaun nii ka s…ôdiq ntoda, kija ka mniq ńßŇčkawas bukuj idas * dijax * dńßuq * daw, kndadax ¶w…ô-*oŇč ¶mbu pa…ĺu puniq kana alaŇč toda, nou baj ¶mijuk ka …ĺ…ĺisaw mbijax alaŇč uka …ĺ…ĺińßan u…ĺi, kija kndadax ńßini ini baj knbijax ¶mijuk tanańß tunux ka alaŇč nii, b…ĺańß kŇčkawas*(knkawas****) idas *dijax ** pnsdńßu ka…ĺi k…ôsa ¶u tanańß tunux mi s…ôdiq ntoda, bukuj daw mntna na kŇčkawas idas * mniq alaŇč nii, b…ĺańß kŇčkawas*(knkawas****) idas *dijax ** pnsdńßu ka…ĺi k…ôsa ¶u tanańß tunux mi s…ôdiq ntoda, bukuj daw mntna na kŇčkawas idas * mniq alaŇč tonba…ĺańß pńßiju "sapańß ptasan toda "(sapańß ptasan piŇč ¶iŇč saja). bukuj ndaan pa…ĺan nii pa, mii ¶u s…ôdiqtoda ¶mijuk ka k…ôsa ¶u tanańß tunux, kija pskjuxaj dmka tnsapańß wada na dńßdilan alaŇč snuwil, id ana pswajaj ka bijax dńßa; kija u…ĺi u mniq kkaalaŇč psmalu ini pnsduŇčus, kija ka mssńßuun, ps…ôuka lŇčluŇčan ¶mijuk tanańß tunux; kiŇčal u…ĺi, plwanun na ka wa tńßijaq alaŇč sslian dx…ĺal b…ĺnuxtoda, kija sa pswaaw qmita, kija p…ôjańß ńßini daw, wada pspuwan tanańß tunux ka alaŇč nii Ňčakan ńßaŇčan alaŇč toda, Ňčalun tlu ka tajwan nii daw …ĺjuxun ńßaŇčan piŇč ¶iŇč da. nniqan alaŇč saja nii u psnakun na: alaŇč tuńßuna ¶ sapańß ptasan piŇč ¶iŇč mi wa niqan saoańß pajsan piŇč ¶iŇč u kija pa…ĺu baj alaŇč tnba…ĺańß;sga mi aju ka mqu…ĺi tudaja; siŇč-j…ô-su kjokaj,sslian ddaun alaŇč, sslian bb…ĺijun pńßpańß mi nniqan ńßabuŇč alaŇč nii u wa mniq …ĺu ¶au kija. pnklaun pnatas …ĺmijaw mi qqtaan pusu baj pnńßjuwan dx…ĺal natou s…ôn-…ĺi sapańß pajsan tutipiq "***"natou s…ôn …ü…ônaj sjaŇčtoda ¶un ńßwa-guwan …ĺu ** ńßawp qntaan pnatas patas natou s…ôn …ü…ônaj sjaŇč koŇč-sw…ô wan- ¶an
S.FORM: = Toda = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang Toda. 252 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 795 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 97% niqan 773 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 3% niqan 22 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, kleelug hari ka nseejiq alang nii. Hangan alang alang Toda Tnteanak knmalu alang Wa mniq jen-ay syang Toda cun ka alang Toda, pndaan tyyayung yayung Mtudu, niqan dwiyaq Wey-san(2682m) ka hnraan hidaw, niqan sapah paysan tutipiq ka alang ruwan. Nniqan na Nan-tou seyn jen-ay syang Toda cun. Llabang na Wa mniq Rusan dxral tudaya 7km, ssipaw iril yayung Mtudu. Lnglingay na ti-ri šļ§ťÄöŤ≥áŤ®äDdwiyaq haypa 1200m. Patas kklaun ndaan tpaan Mriq rulu: kndadax Tay-14seyn mlutuc 85 seyn mrmux. Mwaluk dieyn-c ti-tu dieyn-c ti-tu alang. Kluwan tnsediq alang Sediq. Kari ddiyun Kari Sediq,kari Tlu. Snhiyan kyokay Kyokay sing-yey-su,kyokay cyo-ro,kyokay deyn-cu Pnyahan alang Wa mniq tudaya dxral 7km Rusan ka alang Pingcing, ssipaw iril yayung mtudu, ddwiyaq tuhunacdwiyaq wey-san, wa qnlangan ddwiyaq ka spac muhing na, ou balay mshrus na dxral, wana bay mkyyungan niqan cikuh hari brnux, ngalan dha phangan brnux Toda, pnspuwan na mhiyu alang 4: Tonbarah:Wa mniq tuhunac bay dxral brnux Pingcing, kiya pwla bay psupu smalu alang. Sga:Wa mniq tubaraw bay dxral brnux Pingcing. Rucau:Wa mniq baraw dxral mshrus muxul Rucau. Brah kngkawas Tlu 4(kngkawas 1908) idas 12 cka na"cckulan ddaun qquri Paran Ay-young-cung", prading u hmntur kmciyuk qmptingan cckulan ddaun nii ka sediq nToda, kiya ka mniq hngkawas bukuy idas 1 diyax 2 dhuq 7 daw, Kndadax cwey-fong cmbu paru puniq kana alang Toda, nou bay cmiyuk ka rrisaw mbiyax alang uka rrihan uri, kiya kndadax hini ini bay knbiyax cmiyuk Tanah Tunux ka alang nii, brah kngkawas1(knkawas1908) idas 1diyax 16 pnsdhu kari keysacu Tanah Tunux mi sediq nToda, bukuy daw mntna na kngkawas idas 8 mniq alang nii, brah kngkawas1(knkawas1908) idas 1diyax 16 pnsdhu kari keysacu Tanah Tunux mi sediq nToda, bukuy daw mntna na kngkawas idas 8 mniq alang Tonbarah phiyu "sapah ptasan Toda "(sapah ptasan Pingcing saya). Bukuy ndaan Paran nii pa, miicu sediqToda cmiyuk ka keysacu Tanah Tunux, kiya pskyuxay dmka tnsapah wada na dhdilan alang Snuwil, id ana pswayay ka biyax dha; kiya uri u mniq kkaalang psmalu ini pnsdungus, kiya ka msshuun, pseuka lnglungan cmiyuk Tanah Tunux; Kingal uri, plwanun na ka wa thiyaq alang sslian dxral brnuxToda, kiya sa pswaaw qmita, kiya peyyah hini daw, wada pspuwan Tanah Tunux ka alang nii ngakan hangan alang Toda, ngalun Tlu ka Taywan nii daw ryuxun hangan Pingcing da. Nniqan alang saya nii u psnakun na: Alang tuhunac sapah ptasan Pingcing mi wa niqan saoah paysan Pingcing u kiya paru bay alang Tnbarah;Sga mi Ayu ka mquri tudaya; Sing-yey-su kyokay,sslian ddaun alang, sslian bbriyun phpah mi nniqan habung alang nii u wa mniq Rucau kiya. Pnklaun pnatas rmiyaw mi qqtaan pusu bay pnhyuwan dxral Natou seyn-ri sapah paysan tutipiq "546"Natou seyn jenay syangToda cun hwa-guwan ru 17 hawp Qntaan pnatas Patas Natou seyn jenay syang kong-swe wan-can

uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, kl…ô…ôlug ńßa…ĺi ka ns…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč nii. ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč toda tnt…ôanak knmalu alaŇč wa mniq …ü…ôn-aj sjaŇč toda ¶un ka alaŇč toda, pndaan tjjajuŇč jajuŇč mtudu, niqan dwijaq w…ô-san(****m) ka ńßn…ĺaan ńßidaw, niqan sapańß pajsan tutipiq ka alaŇč …ĺuwan. nniqan na nan-tou s…ôn …ü…ôn-aj sjaŇč toda ¶un. llabaŇč na wa mniq …ĺusan dx…ĺal tudaja *km, ssipaw i…ĺil jajuŇč mtudu. lŇčliŇčaj na ti-…ĺi ****ddwijaq ńßajpa ****m. patas kklaun ndaan tpaan m…ĺiq …ĺulu: kndadax taj-**s…ôn mlutu ¶ ** s…ôn m…ĺmux. mwaluk di…ôn- ¶ ti-tu di…ôn- ¶ ti-tu alaŇč. kluwan tns…ôdiq alaŇč s…ôdiq. ka…ĺi ddijun ka…ĺi s…ôdiq,ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan kjokaj kjokaj siŇč-j…ô-su,kjokaj ¶jo-…ĺo,kjokaj d…ôn- ¶u pnjańßan alaŇč wa mniq tudaja dx…ĺal *km …ĺusan ka alaŇč piŇč ¶iŇč, ssipaw i…ĺil jajuŇč mtudu, ddwijaq tuńßuna ¶dwijaq w…ô-san, wa qnlaŇčan ddwijaq ka spa ¶ muńßiŇč na, ou balaj msńß…ĺus na dx…ĺal, wana baj mkjjuŇčan niqan ¶ikuńß ńßa…ĺi b…ĺnux, Ňčalan dńßa pńßaŇčan b…ĺnux toda, pnspuwan na mńßiju alaŇč *: tonba…ĺańß:wa mniq tuńßuna ¶ baj dx…ĺal b…ĺnux piŇč ¶iŇč, kija pwla baj psupu smalu alaŇč. sga:wa mniq tuba…ĺaw baj dx…ĺal b…ĺnux piŇč ¶iŇč. …ĺu ¶au:wa mniq ba…ĺaw dx…ĺal msńß…ĺus muxul …ĺu ¶au. b…ĺańß kŇčkawas tlu *(kŇčkawas ****) idas ** ¶ka na" ¶ ¶kulan ddaun qqu…ĺi pa…ĺan aj-jouŇč- ¶uŇč", p…ĺadiŇč u ńßmntu…ĺ km ¶ijuk qmptiŇčan ¶ ¶kulan ddaun nii ka s…ôdiq ntoda, kija ka mniq ńßŇčkawas bukuj idas * dijax * dńßuq * daw, kndadax ¶w…ô-*oŇč ¶mbu pa…ĺu puniq kana alaŇč toda, nou baj ¶mijuk ka …ĺ…ĺisaw mbijax alaŇč uka …ĺ…ĺińßan u…ĺi, kija kndadax ńßini ini baj knbijax ¶mijuk tanańß tunux ka alaŇč nii, b…ĺańß kŇčkawas*(knkawas****) idas *dijax ** pnsdńßu ka…ĺi k…ôsa ¶u tanańß tunux mi s…ôdiq ntoda, bukuj daw mntna na kŇčkawas idas * mniq alaŇč nii, b…ĺańß kŇčkawas*(knkawas****) idas *dijax ** pnsdńßu ka…ĺi k…ôsa ¶u tanańß tunux mi s…ôdiq ntoda, bukuj daw mntna na kŇčkawas idas * mniq alaŇč tonba…ĺańß pńßiju "sapańß ptasan toda "(sapańß ptasan piŇč ¶iŇč saja). bukuj ndaan pa…ĺan nii pa, mii ¶u s…ôdiqtoda ¶mijuk ka k…ôsa ¶u tanańß tunux, kija pskjuxaj dmka tnsapańß wada na dńßdilan alaŇč snuwil, id ana pswajaj ka bijax dńßa; kija u…ĺi u mniq kkaalaŇč psmalu ini pnsduŇčus, kija ka mssńßuun, ps…ôuka lŇčluŇčan ¶mijuk tanańß tunux; kiŇčal u…ĺi, plwanun na ka wa tńßijaq alaŇč sslian dx…ĺal b…ĺnuxtoda, kija sa pswaaw qmita, kija p…ôjańß ńßini daw, wada pspuwan tanańß tunux ka alaŇč nii Ňčakan ńßaŇčan alaŇč toda, Ňčalun tlu ka tajwan nii daw …ĺjuxun ńßaŇčan piŇč ¶iŇč da. nniqan alaŇč saja nii u psnakun na: alaŇč tuńßuna ¶ sapańß ptasan piŇč ¶iŇč mi wa niqan saoańß pajsan piŇč ¶iŇč u kija pa…ĺu baj alaŇč tnba…ĺańß;sga mi aju ka mqu…ĺi tudaja; siŇč-j…ô-su kjokaj,sslian ddaun alaŇč, sslian bb…ĺijun pńßpańß mi nniqan ńßabuŇč alaŇč nii u wa mniq …ĺu ¶au kija. pnklaun pnatas …ĺmijaw mi qqtaan pusu baj pnńßjuwan dx…ĺal natou s…ôn-…ĺi sapańß pajsan tutipiq "***"natou s…ôn …ü…ônaj sjaŇčtoda ¶un ńßwa-guwan …ĺu ** ńßawp qntaan pnatas patas natou s…ôn …ü…ônaj sjaŇč koŇč-sw…ô wan- ¶an
